LightningComponentBundle.description: This component enables to display a list of records within a Map.

property.name: cardClass
property.label: Card CSS Class
property.description: CSS Classes for the wrapping card div

property.name: mapHeight
property.label: Display Map height
property.description: Height in px/em... of the map display.

property.name: displayHeight
property.label: Display List height
property.description: Height in px/em... of the result list.

property.name: buttonSize
property.label: Button Size
property.description: Size of the standard header buttons (to align with custom header actions)

property.name: configName
property.label: Query Configuration
property.description: (Developer)Name of the Query Configuration record to be used (see sfpegList__mdt).

property.name: actionConfigName
property.label: Header Action Configuration
property.description: (Developer)Name of the Action Configuration record to be used in header (see sfpegAction__mdt).

property.name: footerConfigName
property.label: Footer Action Configuration
property.description: (Developer)Name of the Action Configuration record to be used in footer (see sfpegAction__mdt).

property.name: showExport
property.label: Show Export?
property.description: Flag to show Export action in header.

property.name: maxSize
property.label: Max. #Actions Displayed
property.description: Max number of actions displayed before overflow in menu.

property.name: mapLegend
property.label: Legend
property.description: Map legend

property.name: listView
property.label: List View
property.description: Display mode for the address side list view

property.name: draggable
property.label: Draggable?
property.description: Enables dragging to pan the map with the mouse.

property.name: zoomControl
property.label: Zoom Control?
property.description: Shows the +/- zoom controls.

property.name: scrollwheel
property.label: Scroll with Wheel?
property.description: Permits zooming with the mouse wheel.

property.name: disableDefaultUI
property.label: Disable Default UI?
property.description: Remove Map/Satellite and +/- zoom buttons.

property.name: disableDoubleClickZoom
property.label: Disable 2-Clicks Zoom?
property.description: Disable zooming with a mouse double-click

property.name: isDebug
property.label: Debug?
property.description: Flag to show debug information.

property.name: isDebugFine
property.label: Debug (fine) ?
property.description: Flag to show debug information for all sub-components.

property.name: cardClass
property.label: Card CSS Class
property.description: CSS Classes for the wrapping card div

property.name: mapHeight
property.label: Display Map height
property.description: Height in px/em... of the map display.

property.name: displayHeight
property.label: Display List height
property.description: Height in px/em... of the result list.

property.name: buttonSize
property.label: Button Size
property.description: Size of the standard header buttons (to align with custom header actions)

property.name: configName
property.label: Query Configuration
property.description: (Developer)Name of the Query Configuration record to be used (see sfpegList__mdt).

property.name: actionConfigName
property.label: Header Action Configuration
property.description: (Developer)Name of the Action Configuration record to be used in header (see sfpegAction__mdt).

property.name: footerConfigName
property.label: Footer Action Configuration
property.description: (Developer)Name of the Action Configuration record to be used in footer (see sfpegAction__mdt).

property.name: showExport
property.label: Show Export?
property.description: Flag to show Export action in results list header.

property.name: maxSize
property.label: Max. #Actions Displayed
property.description: Max number of actions displayed before overflow in menu.

property.name: mapLegend
property.label: Legend
property.description: Map legend

property.name: listView
property.label: List View
property.description: Display mode for the address side list view

property.name: draggable
property.label: Draggable?
property.description: Enables dragging to pan the map with the mouse.

property.name: zoomControl
property.label: Zoom Control?
property.description: Shows the +/- zoom controls.

property.name: scrollwheel
property.label: Scroll with Wheel?
property.description: Permits zooming with the mouse wheel.

property.name: disableDefaultUI
property.label: Disable Default UI?
property.description: Remove Map/Satellite and +/- zoom buttons.

property.name: disableDoubleClickZoom
property.label: Disable 2-Clicks Zoom?
property.description: Disable zooming with a mouse double-click

property.name: isDebug
property.label: Debug?
property.description: Flag to show debug information.

property.name: isDebugFine
property.label: Debug (fine) ?
property.description: Flag to show debug information for all sub-components.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: API Name of Current Object.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record ID
property.description: ID of current Record
